mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tin_tuc ORDER BY IFNULL(ngay_xuat_ban, '1970-01-01') DESC, ma DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tin_tuc WHERE hoat_dong = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tin_tuc (tieu_de, tom_tat, noi_dung, duong_anh, ngay_xuat_ban, hoat_dong) VALUES (#{tieuDe}, #{tomTat}, #{noiDung}, #{duongAnh}, #{ngayXuatBan}, #{hoatDong})
